input.cta: Create your AI assistant — let your website answer while you're asleep.
input.hook: Someone typed an urgent question into your website last night
input.angle: Walk through the exact moment a small business owner realizes their website was visited overnight by ready-to-hire prospects who left no trace — exposing the silent cost of having no way to respond to visitors outside business hours. The story centers on a professional services owner checking their analytics in the morning and seeing the traffic spike, but finding an empty inbox. No names, no emails, no way back in. The pain point is visceral: you were open for business on paper, but completely closed in practice.
input.topic: The lawyer who woke up to three missed inquiries — and zero contact details to follow up with

scenes.image_prompt: Soft polished 3D render, portrait 9:16 vertical frame. Home kitchen environment, cool clear morning light. Three-quarter angle. Centered subject with generous vertical headroom. Close on a person's hands holding a smartphone in dim evening-toned light — the phone screen glows softly, showing a chat interface with a sent message bubble and a small 'seen' indicator beneath it. No reply bubble. The screen is quiet. The hands are still, waiting. Natural textures, restrained saturation, soft pastel accents. No readable text, no UI labels, no notifications visible as text. The emotional state is tension — a question sent into silence.

input.script:
BEAT 1 — HOOK (0–3s): Tight close on a person's hands holding a phone in dim evening light, typing an urgent question into a website. The message sends. A 'seen' indicator appears. No reply. The screen sits quiet.

BEAT 2 — SETUP (3–10s): Cut to a home kitchen, cool morning light. A professional — lawyer, consultant, service owner — stands at the counter with coffee, scrolling their phone. Inbox: empty. Analytics: traffic spike from last night. The gap between those two facts hangs in the air.

BEAT 3 — ESCALATION (10–17s): We see the visitor's side again — three separate chat threads, all sent, all unanswered. No email, no name, no contact detail left behind. Each thread fades to grey. The visitor is already gone. The business owner has nothing to follow up with.

BEAT 4 — RESOLUTION (17–24s): Same late-night scene. Same urgent question typed. But this time, an AI response appears instantly — calm, helpful, on-brand. The visitor replies. A name and email are captured. Cut to the owner's morning kitchen — this time, a notification in the inbox. One name. One lead. Caught while they slept.

VOICEOVER runs across all beats. CTA delivered in final seconds.
input.concept: Handheld urgency: the camera opens tight on a person's hands typing an urgent question into a website chat on their phone, late at night. The reply thread shows 'seen' — and nothing more. We widen to reveal the business owner's side: a morning kitchen scene, coffee in hand, checking an empty inbox. The irony lands hard — the website had visitors, the owner had no idea. We escalate: multiple missed threads, zero contact details, no way back. Then the resolution: the same website, same late-night visitor — but this time a calm AI response appears instantly. The visitor stays. The lead is captured. The owner wakes up to a name in their inbox.
input.scenario: A potential client lands on a law firm's website at 11 PM to ask about a contract dispute, but there's no one available to respond and they leave without leaving any contact details.
input.subtitles: Urgent question dies in silence. | Someone typed into your website last night. Hit send. And waited. | Your site said nothing back. | No answer. No form. No way to reach them this morning. | They moved on. You never knew they were there. | Every unanswered visitor is a lead you can't chase — you never got their name. | Your website was open. You just weren't in it. | Fenrik.chat answers for you. | Create your AI assistant today.

phases.delivery: Opening: bold, steady confidence on the first claim.
Body: conversational contrast — short sentences, not one long equally-paced paragraph.
Emphasis: slight lift on the key turn, contradiction, or insight line.
Brief pause before the reveal, punchline, or payoff.
Close: satisfying landing; CTA only if present, never aggressive.

delivery_arc.tts_instruction_fragment: Opening: bold, steady confidence on the first claim. Then settle into conversational body delivery. Use spoken rhythm: short sentences, contrast, and a brief pause before the reveal. Emphasize the turn or punchline — do not read every clause at the same energy. Avoid long equally-paced paragraphs; land one idea per breath. Dry, knowing, slightly amused.

input.voiceover_text: Someone typed an urgent question into your website last night. Hit send. And waited. Your site said nothing back. No answer, no form, no way to reach them this morning. They moved on. You never even knew they were there. Every unanswered visitor is a lead you can't chase — because you never got their name. Your website was open. You just weren't in it. Fenrik.chat answers for you. Create your AI assistant today.
